meta.next_session: 2026-06-30 6:00 AM PDT (Daily Brief) — archive today's AH report; pre-open gap check; route $36 cash to DRIP if dividend engine fixed and matrix fresh

thoughts.label: SAFE MODE — 3:20 PM ENGINE RUN DID NOT FIRE
thoughts.text: The scheduled 3:20 PM close+AH Signal Engine run did not fire; the latest signal_matrix.json is the ~12:22 PDT run, 3h11m old at this 3:33 PM session — over the §2.5 3-hour limit. CLU is in SAFE MODE: no new entries this session, manage existing positions only. This is the engine's SECOND miss today (the 5:50 AM run also failed before recovering ~09:30). Engine reliability is the recurring flag.

thoughts.label: RECONCILED — 6 POSITIONS, NO STOP BREACHES
thoughts.text: Broker holdings (INTC, ARKK, NVDA LAB + VOO, QQQ, SOXX CORE) match memory exactly. Gap/stop check on the LAB sleeve is CLEAR: INTC +17%, ARKK +9.9%, NVDA +2.5% above their ATR stops. Cash $36.37, no new deposit (pending_deposits $0). CORE/DRIP carry no stops (§13/§15.4).

thoughts.label: COMPOSITES COOLED BULLISH → NEUTRAL
thoughts.text: On the 12:22 matrix, momentum readings faded into the afternoon: INTC 0.302→−0.058, DELL +0.312→−0.119, MU +0.172→−0.052 all dropped from BULLISH to NEUTRAL; NVDA improved −0.502→−0.412. Every CORE and most LAB names now sit −0.1 to −0.2 — a broadly NEUTRAL tape with no directional edge.

thoughts.label: TOMORROW: DRIP IF UNBLOCKED, ELSE HOLD
thoughts.text: DRIP stays the most-underweight tier (0% vs 30%, −30pp) and is the top capital priority for the $36.37 cash — but it is double-blocked: the dividend engine still emits broken data (§15.3 unverifiable) AND SAFE MODE forbids entries. At the 6:00 AM Daily Brief, route to DRIP only if a fresh matrix lifts SAFE MODE and the dividend data is reliable; otherwise hold cash.

thoughts.label: LAB OVER STAGING CAP — NO NEW SINGLE-STOCK ENTRIES
thoughts.text: LAB is 25.7% vs its 20% Accumulation cap. RXRX (gate slipped 4/5→3/5 as Z rose to 1.63) and CRWD (3/5, overbought) remain deferred — §17.3 forbids force-selling to rebalance, so the sleeve dilutes only as deposits grow the base. Combined with SAFE MODE, no LAB add is on the table.

accuracy.lab_scorecard: LAB vs QQQ — not yet graded on signal-conditioned trades. 1 graded (MRVL -1.0, pre-engine baseline); 3 pending (INTC 07-01, ARKK/NVDA 07-02).
